concepts.name: success
concepts.definition_snippet: State or condition of meeting a defined range of expectations

concepts.name: American Dream
concepts.definition_snippet: Ideal of success linked to American Dream

concepts.name: natural selection
concepts.definition_snippet: Variation in successful survival and reproduction

concepts.name: mindset
concepts.definition_snippet: Growth mindset supports persistence toward success

concepts.name: competition
concepts.definition_snippet: Success criteria depend on competitive context

concepts.name: subjectivity
concepts.definition_snippet: Success is relative to observer and belief system
